---
title: "Colophon"
---

This book was written in [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and rendered to HTML and PDF. All analyses were conducted in R. The source code is available at the book's GitHub repository.

The R session information below documents the computational environment used to produce this edition, including the R version, platform, and all packages loaded during rendering.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

cat("Build date:", format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y"), "\n")
cat("Quarto version:", as.character(quarto::quarto_version()), "\n")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

sessionInfo()
```
